name: obedience-benchmark-marketplace
description: Plugin marketplace for the Obedience Benchmark ecosystem. Hosts benchmark plugins, task packs, and judge extensions.

plugins.name: Obedience Benchmark
plugins.description: Core benchmark plugin for measuring AI agent obedience to prescribed processes. Tests whether agents follow specific procedural instructions across 7 dimensions: completeness, ordering, conditionality, parallelism, granularity, aggregation, and error handling.
plugins.author: obedience-benchmark

categories.name: Benchmarking
categories.description: Plugins for testing and evaluating AI agent capabilities

categories.name: Task Packs
categories.description: Additional benchmark task collections for specific domains

categories.name: Judge Extensions
categories.description: Custom scoring dimensions and evaluation strategies

categories.name: Runner Harnesses
categories.description: Adapters for additional AI agent platforms
